creator: mkj1@wkcorp.com
text:
The system is installed with 1 160GB SATA and 2 320GB SATAs, the Bios
correctly discovers the drives in raid or non-raid mode, and pre install
assigns drives A,C,D(E) correctly

When the On board raid is enabled, the system comes up with an ad4, ad8
and ar0 drives, and complains that the ar0 has no secondary drive. the
ad8 should not be there.

when the on board raid is disabled, the system comes up with only the ad4
and ad8 regardless of which channel the 3rd drive is on (even through the
pre boot said there was a drive E)

I have not done a build yet, but also could not find any supporting
information on this motherboard.
